## 🚦 GATES — human/external, and nothing else records them

*An engine tag, a deploy, a migration, a store approval. These have **no git commit and no code to
grep** — delete one and it is simply gone. They stay on the board until they are done.*

| Gate | Module | Owner | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| **DEPLOY-CENTS** — Deploy the cents formatter to staging before the API-4 migration runs | Cross-cutting | you | GATE: a human deploy. If the migration lands before the formatter ships, staging renders raw cents as dollars. Nothing in git records whether this happened — only this row does. |
